2. In furtherance of our order dated 21.03.2024, and to 
take it to its logical conclusion, we direct that if anyone 
of these thirty one candidates have secured the requisite 
minimum mark(s) as is provided for reserved (SC/ST) 
candidates, they shall be called for interview.”
53.1. This Court in this case, thus exercising its powers, found fit 
to undo the discrimination of not treating PwD as a separate 
class which requires to be treated so as to ensure equality 
of results, by not specifying any relaxations or concessions 
which was provided to other reserved candidates. 
54. This Court in Haridas Parsedia v. Urmila Shakya,44 dealt with whether 
when relaxation of marks is not permitted to SC/ST candidates who
